title: NoBroker Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: NoBroker Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NoBroker Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
